content:
Sharing this repo: https://github.com/andreaTP/skill-compile-to-wasm

It’s an attempt to make the “compile to Wasm” path a bit more approachable. The current getting started experience can feel a little steep, so this aims to provide a simpler entry point to get up and running.

Would love to hear any feedback or thoughts!
Love it! I have another one I've been playing with for a while here: https://github.com/cosmonic-labs/skills/blob/main/webassembly-component-development/SKILL.md
Nice! I'm open to merge the efforts, not fussy about where, do you prefer me to try to contribute or I can incorporate what's missing
i think @Yosh Wuyts might have some around, not sure
I don't yet have any of my own; I've been reusing Bailey's
I'm open to any direction! These should definitely exist and be kept up to date as we evolve BA tools.
I'd go with the most visible, independent and easily accessible organization we can get @Bailey Hayes do we have options?
